rss.title: New video game console aims to get kids moving
rss.snippet: The cube-shaped console will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.

arxiv_papers.title: Generative AI impacts on intra-urban inequality and skill premium in Beijing
arxiv_papers.snippet: Generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) is the first automation wave to reach high-cognitive tasks at scale, yet its effects on intra-urban inequality remain largely unknown. podcast: [How to raise kids who question AI | Randi Williams] AI education researcher Randi Williams has spent years studying how kids interact with technology and toys, and what she's found should make every parent stop and think.
